title: RST-001: System Logger Offline
description:
Error: System logger is offline. Manual log entry required to proceed.
You have two variables: level = "WARNING" event_id = "1542"
You must print() the log entry in the exact system format to be authenticated. Example Format: [WARNING] Status: 3842

title: RST-002: Database Connection String Update
RST-003: Oxygen Scrubber Parity Check
description:
Error: Oxygen scrubber synchronization fault. Cycle parity check required to clear the fault.
You have one variable: int cycleCount;
Instruction: Using the modulus operator (%), print a status message followed by a boolean evaluation of whether the cycle count is an even number.
Example Format: Even Cycle Active: true

title: RST-004: Thruster Telemetry Calculation
description:
Error: Thruster telemetry mismatch. Real-time thrust calculation required.
You have two variables: int basePower = 400; double multiplier = 1.5;
Instruction: You must print the calculated thrust (base power multiplied by the multiplier) with its unit.
Example Format: Current Thrust: 300.0 kW

title: RST-005: String Identity Crisis
